execution_group_meanings.evidence_blocked: Exact source evidence is insufficient for a write package.
execution_group_meanings.no_write_governance: Governance says this should not become a canonical printing row now.
execution_group_meanings.dependency_blocked: A base parent, base finish, or existing dependency must be resolved first.
execution_group_meanings.manual_adjudication: A human taxonomy/event-label decision is required before packaging.
execution_group_meanings.future_dry_run_ready: Evidence is ready for a separate rollback-only dry-run package. This still does not authorize real apply.

guidance.evidence_needed: No child-printing evidence needed; these belong outside canonical printings unless a source proves a distinct physical card lane.
